description: A CFD pre-processing engineer needs to generate a computational surface mesh for the eCRM-001 wing-body configuration. The model is currently loaded from /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3. Use OpenVSP's dedicated CFD Mesh tool (Analysis > CFD Mesh) — do NOT just use File > Export. Configure the global mesh sizing parameters as follows: Max Edge Length = 0.5, Min Edge Length = 0.01, Max Gap = 0.005, Number of Circle Segments = 16, and Growth Ratio = 1.3. Generate the mesh, and once complete, export it in TWO formats to the exports directory: an STL file at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_cfd_mesh.stl and a GMSH file at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_cfd_mesh.msh. Finally, record the resulting mesh statistics (Total Triangles and Total Nodes) displayed in the CFD Mesh panel, and write a summary report to /home/ga/Desktop/cfd_mesh_report.txt. The report should state the mesh parameters used, the total triangles, the total nodes, and confirm the two export formats.
